tasks.title: Create quench-runtime crate and define AST/value model
Integrate swc parser and lower to runtime AST
Implement scope, closures, and interpreter eval loop
Add built-ins: Object, Array, JSON, Math, Date, console, Map, Set
Register bridge host functions and Ink globals from the main crate
Integrate timers and terminal events with the interpreter
Adapt runtime.js and remove rquickjs from the project
Run parity tests and example apps
